title: [spec-compliance] TDMA constants and init mismatch spec
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/link.h TDMA constants (SLOT_DURATION_MS=250, GUARD=50) and lichen_tdma_init() do not match spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md and 09-packets-timing.md requirements for guard time, slot calc via hash(EUI64^epoch). See project-LICHEN-s3t5
